title: SPEC-036 Gaps Remediation - Zod Validation i18n System

tasks.title: Add 3 missing Zod v4 error codes to transformer maps
tasks.description:
Add `invalid_union`, `invalid_key`, `invalid_element` to `ZOD_ERROR_CODE_MAP` (lines 105-130) and `ZOD_ERROR_MESSAGE_MAP` (lines 135-160) in `apps/api/src/utils/zod-error-transformer.ts`. Add cases to `generateUserFriendlyMessage()` and `generateSuggestion()` switch statements. Add `extractErrorParams()` handling for union errors. Resolves GAP-027.

Tests: Add 3 test cases in `apps/api/test/utils/zod-error-transformer.test.ts` — one per new code. Verify correct standardized code, user-friendly message, and suggestion for each.

subtasks.title: Add extractErrorParams() handling for union errors

tasks.title: Add Zod v4 translation keys to validation.json (3 locales)
tasks.description:
Add translation keys for `invalid_union`, `invalid_key`, `invalid_element` to `packages/i18n/src/locales/{es,en,pt}/validation.json`. Keys: `validationError.field.invalidUnion`, `validationError.field.invalidKey`, `validationError.field.invalidElement`. Spanish with real translations, EN/PT with [EN]/[PT] prefix (consistent with current placeholder pattern). Resolves GAP-027 (translation part).

Tests: Verify keys exist and resolve correctly in existing i18n test infrastructure.

tasks.title: Fix defaultHook response nesting — flatten details
tasks.description:
In `apps/api/src/utils/create-app.ts` line 92, change `details: transformedError` to `details: transformedError.details, summary: transformedError.summary, userFriendlyMessage: transformedError.userFriendlyMessage`. This removes the double nesting (`error.details.details`). Resolves GAP-022.

Tests: Update `apps/api/test/utils/create-app.defaulthook.test.ts` — change assertions at line 230+ to expect flat `details` array instead of nested object. Verify `response.error.details` is an array of field errors.

subtasks.title: Update defaultHook test assertions for flat structure
Verify all defaultHook tests pass with new structure

tasks.title: Standardize validation middleware response format
tasks.description:
Standardize the 3 different response paths in `apps/api/src/middleware/validation.ts` to use the same envelope format as the fixed defaultHook (from T-003). Ensure Path 2 (Zod handler) and Path 3 (ValidationError handler) both produce `{ error: { code, message, details: [...], summary: {...} } }`. Resolves GAP-030.

Tests: Add/update tests in validation middleware test file to verify consistent response shape across all 3 paths.

subtasks.title: Verify all 3 paths produce identical envelope shape

tasks.title: Rename TransformedValidationError message fields + JSDoc
tasks.description:
In `apps/api/src/utils/zod-error-transformer.ts`, rename `message` to `messageKey` and `translatedMessage` to `zodMessage` in the `TransformedValidationError` interface. Add comprehensive JSDoc to the interface explaining what each field contains. Update all references in the transformer file (line 588+), tests, and any admin code that reads these fields. Resolves GAP-029.

Tests: Update existing transformer tests to use new field names. Verify no regressions.

subtasks.title: Update test assertions with new field names

tasks.title: Create ApiValidationErrorSchema + parseApiValidationErrors utility
tasks.description:
Create `apps/admin/src/lib/errors/parse-api-validation-errors.ts`. Define `ApiValidationErrorSchema` Zod schema matching the new flattened API error response (from T-003/T-005). Export `parseApiValidationErrors({ error, t })` that uses `safeParse` to extract field-level errors and returns `Record<string, string>`. Resolves GAP-032 (utility part).

Tests: Create `apps/admin/test/lib/errors/parse-api-validation-errors.test.ts` with tests for: valid error response, malformed response, empty details, missing fields.

tasks.title: Update EntityCreateContent to use parseApiValidationErrors
tasks.description:
Replace the `JSON.parse(error.message)` pattern in `apps/admin/src/components/entity-pages/EntityCreateContent.tsx` (lines 191-220) with a call to the new `parseApiValidationErrors()` utility. Remove the try-catch JSON.parse block. Resolves GAP-040 (create part).

Tests: Verify existing EntityCreateContent behavior — field errors display correctly, fallback for non-validation errors still works.

subtasks.title: Replace JSON.parse block with utility call

tasks.title: Update EntityEditContent to use parseApiValidationErrors
tasks.description:
Replace the `JSON.parse(apiError.body.error.message)` pattern in `apps/admin/src/components/entity-pages/EntityEditContent.tsx` (lines 101-149) with a call to `parseApiValidationErrors()`. Remove the try-catch JSON.parse block. Resolves GAP-040 (edit part).

Tests: Verify existing EntityEditContent behavior — field errors display correctly, fallback for non-validation errors still works.

subtasks.title: Replace JSON.parse block with utility call

tasks.title: Remove dead code from transformer (functions + v3 cases + guard)
tasks.description:
In `apps/api/src/utils/zod-error-transformer.ts`: (1) Remove exported `groupErrorsByField()` (lines 613-627) and `getSimplifiedErrors()` (lines 632-640). (2) Remove 7 unreachable Zod v3 switch cases: `invalid_date`, `invalid_email`, `invalid_url`, `invalid_uuid` in generateUserFriendlyMessage (lines 342-352) and `invalid_email`, `invalid_url`, `invalid_uuid` in generateSuggestion (lines 481-488). (3) Add guard `if (totalErrors === 0) return 'No validation errors found'` to generateOverallMessage(). Resolves GAP-024, GAP-028, GAP-036.

Tests: Remove any tests referencing deleted functions. Add test for empty issues edge case.

tasks.title: Remove dead code in admin (schema registry + _zodSchema prop)
tasks.description:
In `apps/admin/src/lib/validation/schema-registry.ts`: verify `getEntitySchema()` has zero production imports (grep codebase excluding test files). If confirmed dead, remove function + SCHEMA_REGISTRY + test file. In `apps/admin/src/components/entity-pages/EntityEditContent.tsx`: remove `zodSchema` from `EntityEditContentProps` interface (line 24), remove `zodSchema: _zodSchema` destructuring (line 34), remove unused `ZodSchema` import (line 11). Update any callers that pass zodSchema to EntityEditContent. Resolves GAP-006, GAP-007.

Tests: Verify typecheck passes after removals.

subtasks.title: Grep for production imports of getEntitySchema
Remove dead schema registry if confirmed
Update callers passing zodSchema to EntityEditContent

tasks.title: Split zod-error-transformer.ts into 3 files
tasks.description:
Split `apps/api/src/utils/zod-error-transformer.ts` (640 lines pre-cleanup, ~500 post-cleanup) into 3 files: (1) `zod-error-types.ts` — interfaces (TransformedValidationError, ValidationErrorResponse, ValidationErrorSummary) + ZOD_ERROR_CODE_MAP + ZOD_ERROR_MESSAGE_MAP (~75-100 lines). (2) `zod-error-messages.ts` — generateUserFriendlyMessage() + generateSuggestion() + generateOverallMessage() (~200-260 lines). (3) `zod-error-transformer.ts` — transformZodError() + extractErrorParams() + helpers (~250-305 lines). Update all imports across codebase. Resolves GAP-001.

Tests: Verify all existing transformer tests pass with new import paths. Run typecheck.

subtasks.title: Reduce main file to transformZodError + helpers

tasks.title: Add transformer tests: error codes batch 1 (8 codes)
tasks.description:
Add test cases to `apps/api/test/utils/zod-error-transformer.test.ts` for untested error codes batch 1: `required` (missing field), `int` (non-integer number), `uuid` (invalid UUID), `tooHigh` (too_big number), `positive` (non-positive number), `tooLow` (too_small number), `pattern` (regex mismatch), `format` (invalid_format). Each test: create Zod schema triggering the code, validate transformZodError output has correct standardized code + user-friendly message. Resolves GAP-003/016 (part 1).

Tests: 8 new test cases, AAA pattern.

tasks.title: Add transformer tests: error codes batch 2 (7 codes + v4)
tasks.description:
Add test cases to `apps/api/test/utils/zod-error-transformer.test.ts` for untested error codes batch 2: `invalidDate`, `invalidBoolean`, `url`, `length`, `invalidUuid`, plus the 3 new Zod v4 codes (`invalid_union`, `invalid_key`, `invalid_element`). Resolves GAP-003/016 (part 2).

Tests: 7 new test cases, AAA pattern.

tasks.title: Add defaultHook query/params tests + presence assertion
tasks.description:
In `apps/api/test/utils/create-app.defaulthook.test.ts`: add 2 tests for query param validation (valid query passes, invalid query returns 400 with field errors) and 1 test for path param validation. In `apps/api/test/utils/create-app.test.ts`: add `defaultHook: expect.any(Function)` assertion alongside existing `strict: false` check. Resolves GAP-023, GAP-004.

Tests: 3 new test cases in defaulthook test, 1 assertion in create-app test.

tasks.title: Create e2e i18n flow integration test
tasks.description:
Create `apps/api/test/integration/zod-i18n-flow.test.ts`. Test the complete pipeline: (1) Create a Zod schema with `zodError.*` message keys. (2) Trigger validation error. (3) Call `transformZodError()`. (4) Verify output contains correct i18n key in messageKey field. (5) Load real `es/validation.json` and verify the key resolves to a real Spanish translation. Test at least 3 different error types (required, min, invalid_type). Resolves GAP-034.

Tests: 3+ integration test cases chaining full pipeline.

subtasks.title: Setup test with real i18n files
Test required field -> transform -> i18n resolve
Test min length -> transform -> i18n resolve

tasks.title: Add array/nested field validation tests for admin forms
tasks.description:
Create `apps/admin/test/components/entity-form/field-validation.test.ts`. Test: (1) GalleryField array validation — empty array, array with invalid items, max items exceeded. (2) Nested object validation — location.country missing, price.basePrice negative, nested dot-notation error mapping. Use mock EntityFormProvider context. Resolves GAP-008.

Tests: 5+ test cases covering array and nested object scenarios.

tasks.title: Add verification mode to extract-zod-keys script
tasks.description:
In `scripts/extract-zod-keys.ts`: add `--verify` CLI flag. When set: (1) After key discovery, load `packages/i18n/src/locales/{es,en,pt}/validation.json`. (2) Compare extracted keys with entries in each locale file. (3) Report missing translations per locale as structured output. (4) Exit with code 1 if any gaps found, code 0 if all keys have translations. Update the ZodKeysInventory interface to include verification results. Resolves GAP-033.

Tests: Covered by T-018.

subtasks.title: Load and parse 3 locale validation.json files
Compare extracted keys with locale entries
Set exit code based on verification result

tasks.title: Add tests for extract-zod-keys script
tasks.description:
Create `scripts/__tests__/extract-zod-keys.test.ts`. Test: (1) Static key extraction from sample schema. (2) Template literal resolution. (3) Factory function key mapping completeness. (4) 2-segment key warning detection. (5) Output format correctness (ZodKeysInventory shape). (6) Verification mode — missing key detection, exit code. Resolves GAP-043, GAP-014.

Tests: 6+ test cases.

tasks.title: Add CI job + vitest test for i18n key sync
tasks.description:
Add step to `.github/workflows/ci.yml` after tests: run `npx tsx scripts/extract-zod-keys.ts --verify`, fail CI if exit code non-zero. Also create `packages/i18n/test/validation-key-sync.test.ts` as vitest test that programmatically runs the same verification for local `pnpm test`. Resolves GAP-010.

Tests: The vitest test IS the test — verify it catches intentionally missing keys.

subtasks.title: Create vitest test for local validation

tasks.title: Create shared FormError component with built-in ARIA
tasks.description:
Create `apps/web/src/components/ui/FormError.tsx`. React component that renders error messages with full ARIA compliance: `role='alert'`, `aria-live='polite'`, auto-generated `id` from field name (for `aria-describedby`). Props: `{ fieldName: string; error?: string; className?: string }`. Only renders when error is truthy. Follows ContactForm pattern (A+ compliance). Resolves GAP-009 (component part), GAP-039.

Tests: Create `apps/web/test/components/ui/FormError.test.tsx` — test rendering, ARIA attributes, conditional display, id generation.

tasks.title: Create validateField helper for web forms
tasks.description:
Create `apps/web/src/lib/validation/validate-field.ts`. Lightweight validation helper (~20-30 lines) supporting: required, minLength, maxLength, email (RFC-aligned regex), pattern. Returns validation.json i18n key or undefined. No Zod dependency. Resolves GAP-009 (validation part).

Tests: Create `apps/web/test/lib/validation/validate-field.test.ts` — test each validation rule, edge cases (empty string, whitespace-only, boundary lengths).

tasks.title: Create contactApi wrapper + migrate ContactForm
tasks.description:
Create `apps/web/src/lib/api/endpoints-public.ts` with `contactApi.sendContactMessage()` using the existing apiClient pattern (like reviewsApi, userApi). Migrate `apps/web/src/components/content/ContactForm.client.tsx`: replace raw `fetch()` at line 134 with contactApi wrapper, replace manual validation (lines 95-123) with validateField helper, replace manual error `

` elements with FormError component, fix email regex inconsistency (GAP-011). Resolves GAP-031, GAP-011. Tests: Verify form behavior preserved. Verify apiClient is used instead of raw fetch.

subtasks.title: Replace error elements with FormError component
Fix email regex to match RFC standard

tasks.title: Migrate ReviewForm to standardized validation + ARIA
tasks.description:
Migrate `apps/web/src/components/review/ReviewForm.client.tsx`: replace manual validation with validateField helper, replace manual error elements with FormError component, add `id='ratings-error'` to ratings error element (line 303), add `aria-describedby='ratings-error'` to ratings fieldset (line 293). Resolves GAP-041, GAP-009 (ReviewForm part).

Tests: Verify ratings ARIA attributes. Verify validation behavior preserved.

tasks.title: Migrate ReviewEditForm with full ARIA compliance
tasks.description:
Migrate `apps/web/src/components/account/ReviewEditForm.client.tsx` (194 lines, currently 0% ARIA compliance): add validation logic using validateField helper for title (required, minLength) and content (required, minLength), add FormError components for each field, add `aria-required`, `aria-invalid`, `aria-describedby` to title input and content textarea. Resolves GAP-026.

Tests: Verify all ARIA attributes present. Verify validation blocks empty submissions.

subtasks.title: Add aria-required, aria-invalid, aria-describedby to inputs

tasks.title: Migrate ProfileEditForm to standardized pattern
tasks.description:
Migrate `apps/web/src/components/account/ProfileEditForm.client.tsx`: replace manual validation with validateField helper, replace manual error elements with FormError component (auto-includes aria-live='polite'), fix missing aria-live on name error (line 207-215) and bio error (line 277-285). Resolves GAP-042, GAP-009 (ProfileEditForm part).

Tests: Verify aria-live present on all error messages. Verify validation behavior preserved.

tasks.title: Fix 11 Spanish translations with English field names
tasks.description:
In `packages/i18n/src/locales/es/validation.json`, fix 11 translations that contain English field names: homePhone -> 'teléfono particular', mobilePhone -> 'teléfono celular', personalEmail -> 'email personal', workEmail -> 'email laboral', workPhone -> 'teléfono laboral', isEmailVerified -> 'verificación de email', linkUrl -> 'URL del enlace', allowEmails -> 'permitir emails', plus 3 in user.settings namespace. Resolves GAP-035.

Tests: Verify translations load correctly.

tasks.title: Document 2-segment zodError key convention
tasks.description:
Add section to `packages/schemas/docs/` (or `packages/i18n/docs/`) documenting the 2-segment zodError key convention: keys like `zodError.dateRange.invalidRange` are intentional shorthand for generic/utility messages that are not entity-specific. 3+ segment keys (zodError.entity.field.rule) are for entity-specific messages. Update extract script warnings to reference this doc. Resolves GAP-037.

Tests: N/A (documentation only).

subtasks.title: Update extract script warning message to reference doc

tasks.title: Create owner-promotion CRUD schema
tasks.description:
Create `packages/schemas/src/entities/owner-promotion.crud.schema.ts` following the pattern of existing 18 entity CRUD schemas. Define createOwnerPromotionSchema and updateOwnerPromotionSchema with appropriate fields from the owner-promotion model. Export from schemas package barrel. Resolves GAP-013 (part 1).

Tests: Add basic schema validation tests.

tasks.title: Create sponsorship CRUD schema
tasks.description:
Create `packages/schemas/src/entities/sponsorship.crud.schema.ts` following the pattern of existing 18 entity CRUD schemas. Define createSponsorshipSchema and updateSponsorshipSchema with appropriate fields from the sponsorship model. Export from schemas package barrel. Resolves GAP-013 (part 2).

Tests: Add basic schema validation tests.
